missions.name: Methane Prospector Calibration
missions.description: Methane-sniffing prospector satellite is reading negatives across all orbits — almost certainly a sensor drift issue. EVA and recalibrate the mass spectrometer.

missions.name: Sample-Return Beacon Check
missions.description: The beacon that will guide the next sample-return capsule home has a flaky GPS module. EVA out, swap the board, verify lock.
